# ACE-Step 1.5 — AI Music Generator

> ACE-Step is an AI music generation system. Given a text description and optional lyrics, it produces full songs (vocals + instruments) as audio files.

## Quick Start (HTTP API)

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:8010` (API-only mode) or `http://localhost:7860` (Gradio mode)

**Auth:** Optional. Set `ACESTEP_API_KEY` env var; then pass `Authorization: Bearer <key>` header or `ai_token` field in request body.

### Health Check

```
GET /health
→ {"data": {"status": "ok"}, "code": 200}
```

### List Models

```
GET /v1/models
→ {"data": {"models": [{"name": "acestep-v15-chinese-lyric", "is_default": true}], "default_model": "..."}}
```

### Generate Music (simple — one request, one response)

```
POST /release_task
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "prompt": "upbeat pop song with catchy synth hooks",
  "lyrics": "[Verse]\nHello world\n[Chorus]\nSing with me",
  "audio_duration": 30,
  "vocal_language": "en"
}

→ {"data": {"task_id": "uuid", "status": "succeeded"}, "code": 200}
```

Key parameters for `/release_task`:
- `prompt` (string) — description of the music style/mood
- `lyrics` (string) — lyrics with section tags `[Verse]`, `[Chorus]`, `[Bridge]`, etc. Use `[inst]` for instrumental
- `audio_duration` (float) — target duration in seconds (default: model decides)
- `vocal_language` (string) — language code: `en`, `zh`, `ja`, `ko`, etc.
- `bpm` (int) — beats per minute
- `key_scale` (string) — musical key, e.g. `"C major"`, `"A minor"`
- `seed` (int) — reproducibility seed (-1 = random)
- `task_type` (string) — `"text2music"` (default), `"cover"`, `"repaint"`, `"complete"`, `"lego"`

### Query Results

```
POST /query_result
{"task_id_list": ["uuid-1", "uuid-2"]}

→ {"data": [{"task_id": "uuid-1", "status": 1, "result": "{...}"}], "code": 200}
```

### Download Audio

```
GET /v1/audio?path=<encoded-path>
```

### OpenRouter Compatible (Chat Completions)

```
POST /v1/chat/completions
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "model": "acestep/acestep-v15-chinese-lyric",
  "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "A chill lo-fi hip hop beat"}],
  "stream": false
}

→ Standard OpenAI chat completion format with base64-encoded audio in response
```

Supports `stream: true` for SSE (Server-Sent Events).

### LLM Helper Endpoints

- `POST /create_random_sample` — get random example parameters
- `POST /format_input` — enhance caption/lyrics via LLM (`{"prompt": "...", "lyrics": "..."}`)

### Auto-Discovery

- `GET /openapi.json` — machine-readable OpenAPI 3.0 spec
- `GET /docs` — interactive Swagger UI
- `GET /redoc` — ReDoc documentation

## Task Types

| Type | Description | Required Extra Input |
|------|-------------|---------------------|
| `text2music` | Text description to music | `prompt` |
| `cover` | Cover a song with new style | `src_audio_path` or base64 audio in chat |
| `repaint` | Regenerate a section | `src_audio_path` + `repainting_start`/`repainting_end` |
| `complete` | Continue from existing audio | `src_audio_path` |
| `lego` | Multi-track composition | track-specific params |

## Output Formats

`mp3` (default), `flac`, `wav`, `opus`, `aac`, `wav32`. Set via `audio_format` field.

## More Details

See [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt) for complete parameter reference and advanced usage.
